name: Broken Authentication (Weak Session Management)
description: Detects weak session management including missing Secure/HTTPOnly flags on session cookies, session tokens in URLs, and lack of session expiration headers.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Set HttpOnly, Secure, and SameSite flags on all session cookies. Implement session expiration and idle timeout. Regenerate session IDs after authentication. Never expose session tokens in URLs.

intelligence.dfirRelevance: Session hijacking through stolen cookies is a primary persistence mechanism. Missing HttpOnly allows XSS-based session theft; missing Secure allows network sniffing of session tokens.
